# Blog
### America's First Open-Access Quantum Network Is Open for Business
#### 2026-02-24
People still talk about quantum as if it's five and ten years away—but that isn't true. Qunnect has been deploying hardware to transform existing, standard telecom fiber into quantum networks. From New York City to Bozeman and Berlin, quantum networking is out of the lab and operational alongside classical data traffic. Today, we’re bringing that innovation to Albuquerque....
Read More
### From Three Nodes to Three Thousand: The Quantum Data Center Arrives
#### 2026-02-18
If you’ve been following Qunnect’s work the past few months, you’ve likely seen a theme: proving entanglement-based quantum networks can operate beyond a lab and in the real world....
Read More
### Building Quantum Networks on the Infrastructure America Already Has
#### 2026-01-21
For the last four years, Qunnect has been focused on one idea—taking entanglement-based quantum networks out of the lab and into the real world. Today, we’re excited to share the result....
Read More
### Beyond QKD: Quantum entanglement is driving new quantum innovations
#### 2025-11-25
Quantum networking has evolved as entanglement has introduced new capabilities and use cases beyond QKD....
Read More
### Meet Carina: The First Turnkey Quantum Networking System, Deployed
#### 2025-07-31
Quantum computing is often viewed as being years away–a technology of the future. But one critical piece of the quantum future is already here: quantum networking...
Read More
### What Cisco’s Investment Means for Quantum Networking
#### 2025-07-01
Last week, Qunnect announced an oversubscribed $10 million Series A extension, led by Airbus Ventures with new participation from Cisco Investments and other strategic backers. For Qunnect, this is a milestone—but more importantly, it’s a signal...
Read More
### Restoring the Reputation of Vaporware
#### 2024-04-02
The term “vaporware” was coined in 1982 by a Microsoft engineer to describe the company’s Xenix operating system. (If you haven’t heard of Xenix, you’re not alone!) From that point on, vaporware became an accepted practice in the software community to announce features or platforms that would ultimately never make it to market...
Read More
### Autumn in New York Means Quantum
#### 2023-11-09
And that’s a wrap! We had an incredible week at IQT New York where we presented on our latest entanglement distribution projects and hosted more than 60 friends, colleagues, and partners at our R&D facility at the Brooklyn Navy Yard for tours of our GothamQ testbed running live...
Read More
### Entangled State of Mind in Lower Manhattan
#### 2023-09-13
The quantum internet is closer than you think. In fact, if you were near New York University’s Manhattan campus a few weeks ago, there’s a chance you were walking above quantum particles flowing through fibers connected to Brooklyn’s Navy Yard under the city streets...
Read More
### Happy World Quantum Day from Qunnect!
#### 2023-04-14
Quantum technology has made incredible strides in the last few years, and we can think of no better time to come together and celebrate than on World Quantum Day. April 14, or “4.14,” marks the rounded first 3 digits of Planck’s constant, a crucial value in quantum mechanics that is used to describe the behavior of particles at the subatomic level...
Read More
